name: Unsought
short_description: Unsought is a 360-degree first-person, panoramic horror-adventure game set in a regional town of Japan in the 90s. Step into the shoes of an elementary school student who has found themselves lost in an abandoned town. Will you find your way back home…?
detailed_description:
Unsought is a 360-degree first-person, panoramic horror-adventure game set in a regional town of Japan in the 90s.
Step into the shoes of an elementary school student who has found themselves lost in an abandoned town.
Will you find your way back home…?

A horror experience bursting with realism through panoramic scenes

Experience 1990s Japan through 3D townscapes. Explore this nostalgic world in first-person view.

Graphics that will fill you with nostalgia and fear

Relive the nostalgic feel of years gone by through golden-age-style polygons and textures.
Dive into the unique atmosphere and horror experience.

Discover all the endings

Your choices matter? unlock all three endings.
Which ending will you uncover first?


Video uploading and streaming
Players are free to post videos, let's plays, and live stream this game.
Uploads or livestreams that include illegal or inappropriate content, including content that is considerably damaging to the value of the game, are strictly prohibited.
